name: anchor-x402
description: Fifteen x402-paid services for AI agents — pay-per-call USDC on Base or Solana mainnet. Skills: dual-chain hash anchoring, OFAC sanctions screening, signed decision attestation, mainnet tx decode, ENS/SNS resolution, USD spot price, EVM calldata decode, freeform datetime parsing, bundled wallet intelligence, async due-diligence investigator ($7.77), plus five universal LLM endpoints — roast, oracle (with on-chain anchored verdict), TL;DR, aura, grade. Hosted chatbot front-end at chat.anchor-x402.com.

skills.name: anchor
skills.description: Anchor a 32-byte hash to Base + Solana mainnet in parallel. Returns both tx URLs as cryptographic proof of when the hash existed. $0.005 USDC.

skills.name: screen
skills.description: OFAC SDN sanctions + AML screening for any wallet address. Returns sanctions match, flagged programs, risk level. $0.001 USDC.

skills.name: attest
skills.description: Verify a wallet signature over (input_hash, output_hash, decision), then dual-chain anchor the result. Returns verified signer + on-chain proof URLs. $0.010 USDC.

skills.name: decode/tx
skills.description: Structured decode of any mainnet transaction by hash. Supports Base, Ethereum, Solana. Mined txs cached. $0.001 USDC.

skills.name: resolve/name
skills.description: Cross-chain name resolution: ENS (.eth) and Bonfida SNS (.sol). Returns resolved address(es). 1h cache. $0.001 USDC.

skills.name: price/token
skills.description: USD spot price for any major token. By symbol or chain+contract. CoinGecko-backed, 60s cache. $0.001 USDC.

skills.name: decode/calldata
skills.description: Decode raw EVM calldata into function name + typed parameters via openchain.xyz + eth_abi. EVM-only. $0.001 USDC.

skills.name: parse/datetime
skills.description: Parse freeform datetime strings into ISO 8601 + components + relative time + confidence. $0.001 USDC.

skills.name: intel/wallet
skills.description: Unified wallet intelligence bundle. ONE call: balances on Base + Ethereum + Solana, USDC, tx counts, ENS/SNS reverse, sanctions verdict. 8-10 parallel sources. $0.005 USDC.
